title: (Bullish Signal) VTRS, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling VTRS's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron's A.I. dvisor identified 45 similar cases where VTRS's MACD histogram became positive, and 34 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 76%. Current price $14.50 is below $14.91 the lowest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 02/10/21 - 03/15/21, the price experienced a -20% Downtrend, while the week of 03/08/21 - 03/15/21 shows a +6% Uptrend.

https://preview.redd.it/51ka9vn4kfn61.png?width=1527&format=png&auto=webp&s=2fe2a7598b6b6450b4010a7c3068f44bb2f369f5

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator suggests the stock price trend may be in a reversal from a downward trend to an upward trend. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 44 of 56 cases where VTRS's Stochastic Oscillator exited the oversold zone resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 79%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for VTRS just turned positive on March 15, 2021. Looking at past instances where VTRS's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 34 of 45 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 76%.

The 50-day Moving Average for VTRS moved above the 200-day moving average on December 14, 2020. This could be a long-term bullish signal for the stock as the stock shifts to an upward trend.

Following a +4.04% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where VTRS advanced for three days, in 201 of 300 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 67%.

VTRS may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/9939428-viatris-s-vtrs-14-67-moving-average-convergence-divergence-macd-histogram-just-turned-positive?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
